deploy.startCommand: cd backend && python -c "import os; port = int(os.environ.get('PORT', 8000)); port = 8000 if port == 0 else port; from uvicorn import run; run('app.main:app', host='0.0.0.0', port=port, workers=int(os.environ.get('WEB_CONCURRENCY', 2)))"

cd backend && python -c "import os; port = int(os.environ.get('PORT', 8000)); port = 8000 if port == 0 else port; from uvicorn import run; run('app.main:app', host='0.0.0.0', port=port, workers=int(os.environ.get('WEB_CONCURRENCY', 2)), log_level='warning')"
